rules.cssText: .lg\:space-x-80 > :not([hidden]) ~ :not([hidden]) { --tw-space-x-reverse: 0; margin-right: calc(5rem * var(--tw-space-x-reverse)); margin-left: calc(5rem * calc(1 - var(--tw-space-x-reverse))); }

.logoImgSmall { height: calc(.75 * var(--logo-height)); width: calc(.75 * var(--logo-width)); }

.md\:thd-rounded-ext, .md\:thd-rounded-int { --thd-rounded-fluid-min-em: calc(1em * var(--thd-rounded-fluid-min)); --thd-rounded-fluid-max-em: calc(1em * var(--thd-rounded-fluid-max)); --thd-rounded-fluid-slope: calc((var(--thd-rounded-fluid-max) - var(--thd-rounded-fluid-min)) / (var(--thd-fluid-vw-end) - var(--thd-fluid-vw-start))); --thd-rounded-fluid-slope-vw: calc(100vw * var(--thd-rounded-fluid-slope)); --thd-rounded-fluid-y-int: calc(var(--thd-rounded-fluid-min-em) + (-1em * var(--thd-fluid-vw-start) * var(--thd-rounded-fluid-slope))); --thd-rounded-fluid-clamp: clamp(var(--thd-rounded-fluid-min-em),var(--thd-rounded-fluid-y-int) + var(--thd-rounded-fluid-slope-vw),var(--thd-rounded-fluid-max-em)); }

.lg\:space-x-80 > :not([hidden]) ~ :not([hidden]) { --tw-space-x-reverse: 0; margin-right: calc(5rem * var(--tw-space-x-reverse)); margin-left: calc(5rem * calc(1 - var(--tw-space-x-reverse))); }

.lg\:thd-rounded-ext, .lg\:thd-rounded-int { --thd-rounded-fluid-min-em: calc(1em * var(--thd-rounded-fluid-min)); --thd-rounded-fluid-max-em: calc(1em * var(--thd-rounded-fluid-max)); --thd-rounded-fluid-slope: calc((var(--thd-rounded-fluid-max) - var(--thd-rounded-fluid-min)) / (var(--thd-fluid-vw-end) - var(--thd-fluid-vw-start))); --thd-rounded-fluid-slope-vw: calc(100vw * var(--thd-rounded-fluid-slope)); --thd-rounded-fluid-y-int: calc(var(--thd-rounded-fluid-min-em) + (-1em * var(--thd-fluid-vw-start) * var(--thd-rounded-fluid-slope))); --thd-rounded-fluid-clamp: clamp(var(--thd-rounded-fluid-min-em),var(--thd-rounded-fluid-y-int) + var(--thd-rounded-fluid-slope-vw),var(--thd-rounded-fluid-max-em)); }

mediaQueries.condition: only screen and (min-width: 426px) and (max-width: 896px) and (orientation: landscape)

rules.cssText: #onetrust-banner-sdk.vertical-align-content #onetrust-button-group-parent { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 80%; transform: translateY(-50%); }
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-close-btn-container { top: 50%; margin: auto; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); position: absolute; padding: 0px; right: 0px; }
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-close-btn-container button { position: relative; margin: 0px; right: -22px; top: 2px; }
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-close-btn-container { top: 50%; margin: auto; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); position: absolute; right: 0px; }
#onetrust-banner-sdk.vertical-align-content #onetrust-button-group-parent { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 60%; transform: translateY(-50%); }

#onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-iab-2 #onetrust-policy-text, #onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-iab-2 :not(.ot-dpd-desc) > .ot-b-addl-desc { margin-bottom: 1em; width: 50%; border-right: 1px solid rgb(216, 216, 216); padding-right: 1rem; }
#onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-iab-2 .ot-dpd-container { width: 45%; padding-left: 1rem; display: inline-block; float: none; }
#onetrust-pc-sdk #ot-fltr-cnt { max-width: 320px; width: 90%; border-top-right-radius: 0px; border-bottom-right-radius: 0px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 15px; left: auto; right: 40px; top: 85px; }

.ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) td { border-top: none; border-right: none; border-left: none; border-image: initial; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(238, 238, 238); position: relative; padding-left: 50%; }
